# Quality Sources Registry

Last updated: 2025-04-10

## Repository Sources

High-quality repositories to find agents, skills, prompts, and instructions.

| Source | URL | Content | Quality | Last Verified | Notes |
|--------|-----|---------|---------|---------------|-------|
| awesome-copilot | https://github.com/github/awesome-copilot | Agents, Skills, Instructions | ★★★★★ | 2025-04-10 | Official GitHub community collection. Searchable at https://awesome-copilot.github.com |
| spec-kit | https://github.com/github/spec-kit | Agents (spec-driven workflow) | ★★★★★ | 2025-04-10 | Official GitHub. Spec-Driven Development methodology with agent handoffs |
| anthropics/skills | https://github.com/anthropics/skills | Skills (reference implementations) | ★★★★☆ | 2025-04-10 | Anthropic reference. SKILL.md format examples |

## Norm Sources

Authoritative documentation for writing norms of each file type.

### VS Code Copilot (Microsoft/GitHub)

| Source | URL | Covers | Last Verified |
|--------|-----|--------|---------------|
| Custom Agents | https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/customization/custom-agents | `.agent.md` format, frontmatter fields, tools, handoffs | 2025-04-10 |
| Prompt Files | https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/customization/prompt-files | `.prompt.md` format, variables, tool references | 2025-04-10 |
| Agent Skills | https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/customization/agent-skills | `SKILL.md` format, portability standard | 2025-04-10 |
| Custom Instructions | https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/customization/custom-instructions | `.instructions.md`, `copilot-instructions.md`, `applyTo` | 2025-04-10 |
| Subagents | https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/agents/subagents | Subagent patterns, `agents:` field, nesting | 2025-04-10 |
| Customization Overview | https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/customization/overview | General architecture, file hierarchy | 2025-04-10 |

### Anthropic (Claude Code)

| Source | URL | Covers | Last Verified |
|--------|-----|--------|---------------|
| Claude Code Docs | https://code.claude.com/docs/en/ | `CLAUDE.md`, skills, hooks, agent patterns | 2025-04-10 |

| Source | URL | Covers | Last Verified |
|--------|-----|--------|---------------|
| Codex Docs | https://code.openai.com/ | `config.toml`, rules, agent configuration | 2025-04-10 |

### Standards

| Source | URL | Covers | Last Verified |
|--------|-----|--------|---------------|
